title: Retroreflectivity Data Collection
name: Retroreflectivity Data Collection
statement_of_work: Contractor shall provide all labor, tools, materials, supplies, vehicles, equipment, travel and incidentals necessary to collect, analyze and report of RetroReflectivity of Pavement Marking from the Caltrans Highway Network (On-system) as well as on the Non-Caltrans Highway Network (Off-system). DVBE Goals apply DVBE Incentive applies SB Incentive applies. Insurance Required: Commercial General Liability Certificate & Endorsement Automobile Liability Certificate & Endorsement Workers Compensation & Waiver of Subrogation Professional Liability.
deliverables: Execute scope of work described in the Retroreflectivity Data Collection solicitation
Deliver milestones, status reporting, and acceptance documentation
Provide final handoff and post-deployment support per RFP terms
description: Contractor shall provide all labor, tools, materials, supplies, vehicles, equipment, travel and incidentals necessary to collect, analyze and report of RetroReflectivity of Pavement Marking from the Caltrans Highway Network (On-system) as well as on the Non-Caltrans Highway Network (Off-system). DVBE Goals apply DVBE Incentive applies SB Incentive applies. Insurance Required: Commercial General Liability Certificate & Endorsement Automobile Liability Certificate & Endorsement Workers Compensation & Waiver of Subrogation Professional Liability.

unspsc_codes.description: Computer data input devices - Camera based vision systems for automated data collection
